description: Product Description The Talus Kids Base Layer Pants is an ideal lightweight and fast drying base, perfect for active wear. Super soft and comfortable, the technical fabric is high wicking and breathable and will keep your kids comfortable and dry. High Wicking - Actively wicks moisture away from the skin, keeping you dry and comfortable Quick Drying - Great when you're out and about, especially on the slopes and after washing too Lightweight - No added bulk, great when used as part of a layering system Easy Care - The pants are machine washable Product Features Wicking Wicking fabrics actively pull moisture away from the skin towards the surface of the material where it can evaporate more easily, keeping the wearer cool when they perspire. This makes it ideal for indoor or outdoor activities, or travel in warmer climates. Quick Drying Quick drying fabric's dynamic properties makes it perfect material for active wear or travelling. Lightweight Lightweight fabric is perfect for activities such as hiking, walking or cycling. It provides a layer of protection without adding bulk. Product Features Warmth This material has been laboratory tested as waterproof. This means the garment can withstand significant rainfall in a single day without letting moisture in. Easy Care Easy Care clothing can be washed repeatedly in an everyday washing machine cycle using regular detergent. The fabric's strong, durable structure is strong enough to withstand the washing process and last a long time. Talus Kids Pants Merino Kids Pants Merino Kids Stripe Pants Talus Kids Round Neck Top Merino Kids Stripe Round Neck Top Add To Basket Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.3 out of 5 stars 419 4.4 out of 5 stars 410 — 4.4 out of 5 stars 697 4.6 out of 5 stars 3 Price £9.99 £ 9 . 99 — no data — no data — no data — no data Compare Mountain Warehouse Kids Baselayers no data no data no data no data no data no data ✓ ✓ no data ✓ Lightweight ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Quick Drying ✓ no data no data ✓ no data Fabric Composition 100% Polyester 70% merino, 30% polyester Polyester 30% Merino Wool 70% 100% Polyester 70% Merino Wool, 30% Polyester How to Choose Base Layer Clothing Base Layers are worn for one of two reasons; to keep you warm & dry or cool & dry. It is important to select the right one, depending on your needs. Which Fabric? - Synthetic: Good for cool conditions, work well down to about -10*C when worn with ski outerwear. A good-value option for winter sports beginners. - Merino Wool: Regulates body temperature in both warm & cold climates. Tiny air pockets draw excess heat away from the body, but also retain heat in colder conditions (down to -20C). This works even when they get wet! It is also UV resistantl. Suited to more extreme conditions. - Polyester: Quick drying, lightweight & wick away moisture from the skin. Good middle ground for staying cool or warm. What Size? A base layer should be tight fitting so it traps air next to the skin to insulate the body from the cold, or quickly move perspiration to the surface to evaporate off. About Us At Mountain Warehouse we have been developing the very best outdoor gear for all the family since 1997. Unlike other outdoor retailers, we don’t carry lots of different brands. In fact, almost all the products we sell through our stores, website & online are exclusive to Mountain Warehouse – you won’t find them anywhere else. Why do we do this? Well, by designing our own top quality products and having them made to our exacting standards, we can cut out the middleman. So that means you get the exact same quality, but at significantly lower prices than you’ll find at other shops. Everything we do is focused on serving our growing group of customers who like what we have to offer: the best gear, the best service and the best prices. We would love it if you joined them. Mark Neale, Founder
